kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Rope goes with exactly three of Cooper, Saw, Southgate, and 11 coins.
The artisan with the Saw's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
The artisan with the Saw's levy is between the artisan who makes Tapestries and Beatrix.
The artisan with the Loom's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the Mason.
The artisan who makes Rope and Godfrey are in the same ward.
The artisan who makes Tapestries' levy is between the Weaver and Beatrix.
The artisan with the Chisel's levy is immediately below Godfrey.
The artisan with the Chisel does not belong to the Clothiers' Guild.
No members of the Joiners' Guild are in the Market Ward.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is at least 4 coins more than Rowan.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Nightcrawler goes with exactly three of Bass, Wobbler, Willowmere, and 13 lb.
The angler using the Wobbler's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler fishing with Maggot.
The angler using the Wobbler's weight is between the angler fishing with Shrimp and Cody.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Crappie.
The angler fishing with Nightcrawler and Gus are in the same watershed.
The angler fishing with Shrimp's weight is between the angler who landed the Perch and Cody.
The angler using the Crankbait's weight is immediately below Gus.
The angler using the Crankbait does not belong to the Pike Family.
No members of the Sunfish Family are in the East Watershed.
The angler at Stillwater's weight is at least 4 lb more than Royce.
